    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsArgument(Expression child, MethodReference parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsPrefix(ReferencePrefix child, MethodReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttachAsArgument(Expression child, MethodReference parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
